configurations.name: canary-ui
runtimeArgs: cd /Users/oddle/Documents/canary-lab-workspace && if curl -sf -o /dev/null http://127.0.0.1:7420/; then echo 'canary-lab already serving on 7420; attaching'; while curl -sf -o /dev/null http://127.0.0.1:7420/; do sleep 5; done; else exec npx canary-lab ui --no-open; fi
